meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Honen
products.tagline: Automated teaching + learning infrastructure for any company
products.summaryZh: 适用于任何公司的自动化教学+学习基础设施
products.descriptionZh: 创建与公司同步的员工培训。Honen 能在数秒内将团队知识转化为由AI引导的互动课程，包含自适应课程、模拟演练和学习者洞察。当文档、工具或流程发生变化时，课程会自动更新。
products.description: Create employee training that keeps up with your company. Honen turns team knowledge into interactive AI-led courses in seconds, complete with adaptive lessons, simulations, and learner insights. When your docs, tools, or processes change, courses update automatically.

products.name: Browse.sh
products.tagline: Give your agents muscle memory for automating the web
products.summaryZh: 为您的智能体赋予自动化网页操作的肌肉记忆
products.descriptionZh: browse.sh — 一个面向任意网站的浏览器自动化技能开放目录。查找可复用的 SKILL.md 配方，指导 AI 代理完成在线任务，并通过 browse CLI 进行安装。
products.description: browse.sh — an open catalog of browser automation skills for any website. Find reusable SKILL.md recipes that teach AI agents to complete tasks online, and install them with the browse CLI.

products.name: Vaani
products.tagline: Lip-synced AI dubbing for creators, brands and studios
products.summaryZh: 面向创作者、品牌及工作室的唇形同步AI配音
products.descriptionZh: Vaani 是一款保留原声的 AI 配音工具，可一次性完成 40 多种语言的配音，成本仅为传统配音的一小部分。当其他工具只能提供千篇一律的 AI 语音和节奏错位的口型时，Vaani 能克隆你的声音、保留你的音乐、跨语言保持语义，并实现逐帧精准的口型同步。专为视频创作者打造，适用于个人创作者、品牌方、媒体公司、OTT 平台及影视工作室。
products.description: Vaani is a voice-preserving AI dubbing tool to help you dub in 40+ languages, in one go, at a fraction of the cost of a traditional dub session. Where other tools give you a generic AI voice and lips that drift off-beat, Vaani clones your voice, preserves your music, and holds the meaning across languages, with frame-accurate lip sync. Built for anyone creating videos, from creators and brands to media companies, OTTs and studios.

products.name: Supaste
products.tagline: Clipboard Manager for macOS
products.summaryZh: macOS 剪贴板管理器
products.descriptionZh: Supaste 是一款面向 Mac 的本地优先剪贴板与截图历史应用。可保存复制的文本、链接、图片、文件、代码、颜色及截图，并以美观的可搜索时间线形式呈现。
products.description: Supaste is a local-first clipboard and screenshot history app for Mac. Save copied text, links, images, files, code, colors, and screenshots in a beautiful searchable timeline.

products.name: Tamadoggo
products.tagline: A living journal for your pet's life, with AI insights
products.summaryZh: 为宠物生活打造的活态日记，融入AI洞察
products.descriptionZh: 多数宠物应用只是冰冷的记录工具。Tamadoggo 是一本有温度的日记，温柔承载每一次散步、每一餐、每回看诊和每个成长里程碑。它的特别之处在于：温和的 AI 从不唠叨或下诊断。它能梳理时间线中的规律，给出适配品种与年龄的建议，将兽医文件（照片或 PDF）扫描为自动填写的记录，并撰写一封温暖的月度信件。每只宠物都拥有一个“小窝”——一个用插画呈现的、记录它们一生的家园。免费版功能已足够完整，PRO 版则解锁 AI 的魔力。
products.description: Most pet apps are clinical trackers. Tamadoggo is a living journal, a warm place to hold every walk, meal, vet visit and milestone. What stands out: gentle AI that never nags or diagnoses. It surfaces patterns across the timeline, gives breed and age-aware suggestions, scans a vet doc (photo or PDF) into auto-filled records, and writes a warm monthly letter. Each pet gets a "Crib", an illustrated home for their whole life. The free tier is also genuinely complete. PRO adds the AI magic.

products.name: NTSC-RS
products.tagline: Open-source video emulation of analog TV and VHS artifacts
products.summaryZh: 开源视频模拟，复现模拟电视与VHS影像瑕疵
products.descriptionZh: ntsc-rs 是一款免费开源的VHS和模拟电视视频特效工具。可在浏览器中在线使用，也可作为独立应用程序运行，或作为DaVinci Resolve、After Effects等软件的插件使用。
products.description: ntsc-rs is a free, open-source VHS and analog TV video effect. Use it online in your browser, as a standalone application, or as a plugin for DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, and more.

products.name: Sigma File Manager
products.tagline: Free, open-source, cross-platform, modern file manager app
products.summaryZh: 免费、开源、跨平台、现代文件管理器应用
products.descriptionZh: Sigma File Manager 是一款免费、开源、快速迭代的现代化文件管理器（资源管理器/浏览器）应用，支持 Windows 和 Linux（Mac 系统虽受支持但尚未提供构建版本，可通过源码自行构建）。——aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager
products.description: "Sigma File Manager" is a free, open-source, quickly evolving, modern file manager (explorer / browser) app for Windows and Linux (Mac is supported but the build is not provided yet, can be built from source). - aleksey-hoffman/sigma-file-manager

products.name: Claude Artifact Player
products.tagline: Run your Claude AI artifacts natively, No browser. No cloud.
products.summaryZh: 在本地运行你的Claude AI制品，无需浏览器，无需云端。
products.descriptionZh: 在Mac上原生运行Claude AI生成的交互文件，完全离线。无需浏览器，无需云端，即时播放。Claude Artifact Player让你直接在Mac上打开并运行Claude的Artifacts功能生成的交互文件——HTML页面、React JSX组件和TypeScript TSX文件——无需浏览器，也无需上传任何内容。
products.description: Run your Claude AI artifacts natively on your Mac, fully offline. No browser. No cloud. Instant playback. Claude Artifact Player lets you open and run the interactive files that Claude's Artifacts feature generates — HTML pages, React JSX components, and TypeScript TSX files — directly on your Mac, without a browser and without uploading anything anywhere.

products.name: FixtureKit
products.tagline: Turn TypeScript interfaces into realistic mock data
products.summaryZh: 将 TypeScript 接口转换为逼真的模拟数据
products.descriptionZh: FixtureKit 是一款完全基于浏览器的免费工具，利用语义推断将 TypeScript 接口或 Zod 模式转换为逼真的模拟数据。支持以原始 TypeScript、JSON、MSW 处理器或 Playwright 路由模拟形式复制。具备对抗模式，可对用户界面进行压力测试。
products.description: FixtureKit is a free, entirely browser-based tool that uses semantic inference to turn TypeScript interfaces or Zod schemas into realistic mock data. Copy as raw TS, JSON, MSW handlers, or Playwright route mocks. Features an Adversarial Mode to stress-test your UI.

products.name: Trekme.pro
products.tagline: Turn real developer work into skill proof beyond AI resumes
products.summaryZh: 将开发者的实际工作转化为超越AI简历的技能证明
products.descriptionZh: 别再只说“我会Python”了，用行动证明它。Trekme 将你每周的开发者工作转化为仪表盘和报告，像一份互动式简历，每周自动更新。把它想象成你职业生涯的 New Relic 或 Datadog：一份鲜活、可携带的记录，展示你用过什么、用得有多深、技能如何随时间演进，为你提供超越一次性AI生成简历的、有据可查的证明。
products.description: Stop saying "I know Python." Start showing it. Trekme turns your weekly developer work into dashboards and reports that act like an interactive resume and update themselves every week. Think New Relic or Datadog for your career: a living, portable record of what you built with, how deeply you used it, and how your skills evolve over time, giving you documented evidence beyond one-shot, AI-written resumes.

products.name: Vox
products.tagline: Superb free Voice-to-Text that never leaves your device
products.summaryZh: 出色的免费语音转文字，数据始终留在设备本地
products.descriptionZh: Vox 是一款完全运行在 Mac 或 Windows 设备上的语音输入工具。按住快捷键，正常说话即可。清理后的文本会直接存入剪贴板，随时可以粘贴。转录由 Whisper / Parakeet 处理，本地 Gemma 4 模型则负责快速且出色地完成文本清理。音频数据不会离开你的设备，无需创建账户，应用内无追踪，甚至在飞机上也能正常使用。个人使用完全免费。
products.description: Vox is voice typing that runs entirely on your Mac or Windows machine. Hold a hotkey, speak normally. Cleaned-up text lands on your clipboard, ready to paste. Whisper / Parakeet handle transcription. Superb and fast local Gemma 4 model cleans it up. No audio ever leaves your device, no account to create, no tracking in the app, and it keeps working on a plane. Free for personal use.

products.name: Kyro
products.tagline: An AI security bugs hunter for your web app
products.summaryZh: AI安全漏洞猎手，专为您的网页应用设计
products.descriptionZh: Kyro 是一款面向网页应用的人工智能安全漏洞猎手。只需提供一个URL（可选添加凭证和扫描范围），它便会自动映射应用、像真实黑客一样串联攻击链，并在发送邮件前复现每个发现。最终交付的是经确认、可被利用的漏洞及其复现步骤，而非扫描器式的“潜在问题”。
products.description: Kyro is an AI security bugs hunter for your web app. Give it a URL (plus optional creds and scope). It maps the app, chains attacks like a real hunter, and reproduces every finding before emailing you. confirmed, exploitable bugs with reproduction steps, not a scanner's "potential issues."

products.name: Stepmello
products.tagline: A quiet space to pause, reflect, and just be
products.summaryZh: 一个安静的空间，供你停顿、反思、静处。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数应用都在争夺你的注意力，而 Stepmello 则将其归还。Stepmello 是一个宁静、极简的空间，让你可以暂停、反思、捕捉思绪，无需压力、连续记录或繁琐设置。只需进入当下，呼吸，然后开始。没有压力，没有期待，没有框架。想写就写，拍张照片，或者只是静静与思绪相伴。一切皆可选，无一强制。专为那些思绪满溢、需要重置的日常片刻而设计。
products.description: Most apps want your attention. Stepmello gives it back. Stepmello is a calm, minimal space to pause, reflect, and capture thoughts without pressure, streaks, or setup. Just enter the moment, breathe, and begin. No pressure. No expectations. No structure. Write if you want. Capture a photo. Or simply sit with your thoughts. Everything is optional nothing is forced. Built for those small moments in the day when your mind feels full and you just need a reset.

products.name: thita.ai
products.tagline: One AI platform for the entire engineering interview
products.summaryZh: 面向整个工程面试流程的单一AI平台
products.descriptionZh: 别再拼凑LeetCode、YouTube、Notion和Pramp了。Thita.ai是一个AI平台：包含99种DSA模式、语音AI模拟面试、AI教练、系统设计准备和简历工具。专为从应届生到资深工程师、目标进入顶尖公司的工程师打造。已有25000+学习者。
products.description: Stop stitching together LeetCode, YouTube, Notion, and Pramp. Thita.ai is one AI platform: 99 DSA patterns, voice AI mock interviews, an AI coach, system design prep, and resume tools. Built for engineers targeting top companies, from new grad to senior. 25000+ learners

products.name: Financial Data API
products.tagline: A free finance API with 25+ sources
products.summaryZh: 一个包含25+数据源的免费金融API
products.descriptionZh: 免费托管的金融数据API，覆盖8个资产类别、10万+金融工具。从Yahoo、Google、Nasdaq、TradingView、CNBC、CBOE、FINRA、CFTC等26个数据源获取实时和历史市场数据。另提供免费推理端点，用于获取带引用的金融答案。
products.description: A free, hosted financial data API covering 100k+ instruments across 8 asset classes. Get real-time and historical market data from 26 sources including Yahoo, Google, Nasdaq, TradingView, CNBC, CBOE, FINRA, CFTC, and more. Plus a free inference endpoint for cited finance answers.

products.name: BetScan
products.tagline: Stop guessing if an online casino is legitimate or fake.
products.summaryZh: 别再猜测在线赌场是正规还是虚假的了。
products.descriptionZh: 免费浏览器扩展，在您存款前检查在线赌场是否安全。可在2秒内验证赌博牌照、Trustpilot评分、AskGamblers投诉及社区情绪。无需账户，无追踪。
products.description: Free browser extension that checks if any online casino is safe before you deposit. Verifies gambling licenses, Trustpilot ratings, AskGamblers complaints and community sentiment in under 2 seconds. No account, no tracking.

products.name: The Virtual OS Museum
products.tagline: Relive vintage operating systems right on your desktop
products.summaryZh: 在你的桌面上重温经典操作系统
products.descriptionZh: 超过1700个预装操作系统，时间跨度从1948年至今，集成于单一Linux虚拟机中。内置QEMU、VirtualBox和UTM。支持Windows和Linux一键启动。
products.description: Over 1,700 pre-installed operating systems spanning 1948 to today, in a single Linux VM. Bundled QEMU, VirtualBox, and UTM. One-click launchers for Windows and Linux.

products.name: Olo
products.tagline: Style smarter with the world's first AI companion for guys
products.summaryZh: 全球首款男士AI伴侣，助你穿出风格。
products.descriptionZh: “约会穿什么？”是男生最常问自己的问题之一。Olo正是为此而生。作为全球首款专为男性打造的AI穿搭助手，Olo能根据你的个人偏好和场合，提供个性化的着装推荐、搭配建议、衣橱指导以及即时反馈。无论是约会、工作、婚礼还是日常穿搭，Olo都能帮你自信出门。
products.description: "What do I wear for a date?" is one of the most common questions guys ask themselves. Olo was built to solve exactly that. The world's first AI style companion for guys, Olo provides personalised outfit recommendations, styling advice, wardrobe guidance, and instant feedback tailored to your preferences and occasion. From dates and work to weddings and everyday wear, Olo helps guys dress with confidence.

products.name: The Incident Challenge
products.tagline: The Engineering Challenge for the AI age
products.summaryZh: AI时代的工程挑战
products.descriptionZh: 故障挑战赛是面向AI时代的实时调试竞赛，工程师需在日志、代码、运行时、文档及架构中排查真实故障，完成修复并冲击排行榜。请带上你的智能体——它或许能助你一臂之力，也可能毫无用处 :) 挑战赛现已开启，持续24小时。每两周发布新挑战。
products.description: The Incident Challenge is a live debugging challenge for the AI age, where engineers investigate realistic failures across logs, code, runtime, docs, and architecture, then ship the fix and race the leaderboard. Bring your agent. Maybe it helps. Maybe it doesn’t :) The challenge is live now for 24 hrs. New challenge every two weeks.

products.name: Pitch Planner App
products.tagline: Free playing-time tracking for youth soccer coaches.
products.summaryZh: 为青少年足球教练提供的免费训练时长追踪工具。
products.descriptionZh: 免费青少年足球换人追踪工具，支持阵容、轮换、公平上场时间、球员分钟数、花名册及比赛日回顾，仅需一部手机即可操作。
products.description: Free youth soccer substitution tracker for lineups, rotations, equal playing time, player minutes, rosters, and match-day recaps from one phone.
